use std::collections::HashMap;

pub fn load_config(path: &str) -> Config {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path).unwrap();
    let config: Config = serde_json::from_str(&data).unwrap();
    config
}

pub fn get_value(map: &HashMap<String, String>, key: &str) -> String {
    map.get(key).unwrap().clone()
}

pub fn parse_int(s: &str) -> i32 {
    s.parse().unwrap()
}

pub fn connect(url: &str) -> Connection {
    Connection::new(url).unwrap()
}

pub fn process_response(resp: &str) -> serde_json::Value {
    serde_json::from_str(resp).unwrap()
}

pub fn read_file(path: &str) -> String {
    std::fs::read_to_string(path).unwrap()
}

struct Config;
struct Connection;
impl Connection { fn new(_url: &str) -> Result<Self, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> { Ok(Self) } }
